summary: Iteration 32: Comprehensive testing of 4 bug fixes - Categories row click, Pinnwand visibility for non-admins, Table cell background color, and Group-restricted article search visibility. All 10 tests passed - 100% success rate.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Tiptap console warning about duplicate extension names ['link', 'underline'] - not blocking but should be investigated
Minor: DialogContent accessibility warnings for QuickSearch - missing DialogTitle/Description
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bug fixes verified working. Categories.jsx TreeItem onClick on row div works. Dashboard.jsx Pinnwand tab hidden for non-admins. QuickSearch.jsx filters categories by is_pinnwand. ArticleEditor.jsx filters rootCategories and CategoryTreeItem by is_pinnwand. RichTextEditor.jsx TableCell/TableHeader extended with backgroundColor attribute, 15 colors in 5x3 grid. search.py visibility filter with $and query working correctly.

categories_row_click_expand.details: Clicking on category row (not just arrow) expands/collapses children. TreeItem onClick handler on row div works correctly.

dashboard_pinnwand_tab_hidden_for_editor.details: Pinnwand tab is HIDDEN for editor role. Only Dashboard tab visible. Admin sees both Pinnwand and Dashboard tabs.

quicksearch_pinnwand_categories_hidden_f.details: QuickSearch does NOT show Pinnwand categories for editor. Filter by is_pinnwand working in QuickSearch.jsx.

article_editor_pinnwand_categories_hidde.details: ArticleEditor category picker does NOT show Pinnwand categories for editor. rootCategories and CategoryTreeItem filter by is_pinnwand working.

admin_sees_pinnwand_everywhere.details: Admin can see Pinnwand tab on Dashboard, Pinnwand categories in QuickSearch, and Pinnwand categories in ArticleEditor.

table_cell_background_color.details: Table created, cell clicked, Table menu > Zellenhintergrund submenu opens, color applied to cell. TableCell.extend with backgroundColor attribute working.

color_palette_15_colors_5x3_grid.details: Color palette shows exactly 15 colors in a 5-column grid (5x3 layout). Colors: Gelb, Gelb kräftig, Orange, Rot, Rosa, Violett, Blau, Blau kräftig, Türkis, Grün, Grün kräftig, Hellgrau, Grau, Dunkelgrau, Anthrazit.

group_restricted_articles_hidden_from_se.details: Editor (with no groups) cannot see group-restricted articles in search results. 3 group-restricted articles exist, none visible to editor. Backend /api/search visibility filter with $and query working correctly.

api_articles_search_visibility.details: /api/articles/search endpoint also respects visibility. Admin sees 9 results, Editor sees 8 results for same query.

backend_health.details: API health check returns status ok, version 2.0.0

code_review_verification.Categories.jsx: Line 131-133: TreeItem onClick on row div triggers toggleExpand for categories with children
code_review_verification.Dashboard.jsx: Line 205: isAdmin check, Line 207: activeTab defaults to 'pinnwand' for admin else 'dashboard', Line 306-312: Pinnwand tab only rendered if isAdmin
code_review_verification.QuickSearch.jsx: Line 29-30: AuthContext imported, isAdmin check, Line 220-224: categories filtered by (isAdmin || !c.is_pinnwand)
code_review_verification.ArticleEditor.jsx: Line 69: CategoryTreeItem filters children by (isAdmin || !c.is_pinnwand), Line 366: rootCategories filtered by (isAdmin || !c.is_pinnwand)
code_review_verification.RichTextEditor.jsx: Lines 2115-2152: TableCell and TableHeader extended with backgroundColor attribute using inline styles and data-bg-color, Lines 1567-1592: 15 colors in grid-cols-5 layout
code_review_verification.search.py: Lines 54-65: Visibility filter with $and query for visible_to_groups and draft status filtering

.screenshots/iter32_editor_dashboard.png - Editor dashboard showing only Dashboard tab (no Pinnwand)
.screenshots/iter32_editor_quicksearch.png - Editor QuickSearch with no Pinnwand categories
.screenshots/iter32_editor_article_categories.png - Editor ArticleEditor with no Pinnwand categories
.screenshots/iter32_color_palette_open.png - Table menu with Zellenhintergrund submenu showing 15 colors in 5x3 grid
.screenshots/iter32_cell_with_color.png - Table with yellow background color applied to cells
